reviews.comment:
Muy bueno, y muy cómodo sobre todo cuando uno quiere descansar y comer algo a la sombra.
Hay bancos y mesas.

(Translated by Google)
Very nice, and very comfortable, especially when you want to relax and have something to eat in the shade.
There are benches and tables.

reviews.comment:
Hay otro YPF esta muy cerca de este. Muchos mejor y mas grande. Con patios de comida. Si es solo para cargar naftas esta bien. Si es por comida + gasolina. Hay que ir a otro YPF esta sobre rutas.

(Translated by Google)
There's another YPF very close to this one. Much better and bigger. With food courts. If it's just to fill up with gas, that's fine. If it's for food and gas, you'll have to go to another YPF; it's on the highway.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13657899365243523321/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXal9YRk5nEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención. Muy buena mercadería. Las ensaladas muy fresca y ricas. Los baños impecables. Muy recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Very good merchandise. The salads are very fresh and delicious. The bathrooms are spotless. Highly recommended.

reviews.comment:
muy vuidade y limpios sus baños. felicito al personal que lo hace pocible dia a dia.
le falta un lugar adecuado, en semejante predio, para poder pernoctar en motorhom o camion. duchas. etc.

(Translated by Google)
Very clean and well-maintained bathrooms. I congratulate the staff who make it possible every day.
It lacks a suitable place, on such a large property, for overnight stays in motorhomes or trucks. Showers, etc.
